item.title: v1.0.102
item.description: What's Changed chore: bump oven-sh/setup-bun to v2.2.0 (Node.js 24) by @ashwin-ant in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1238 docs: nit updates to security.md by @OctavianGuzu in https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action/pull/1240 Full Changelog: https://github.com/anthro
